opportunities.label: HYPE LONG
opportunities.why: 9 aligned traders | quality 84 | sticky across 8 recent snapshots | 8 green / 1 underwater | workable
opportunities.timingRead: Not first, but still in a workable part of the move.
opportunities.durationRead: Typical winners have around 2 days left from here.
opportunities.tradeExplanation: 9 slower traders are aligned on HYPE LONG, with 8 green and 1 underwater. Average entry age is 9.1 days versus a typical winning hold of 11 days, so this looks workable.
opportunities.entryPlan: Let the pullback mature, then only act if leader size stays intact on the next refresh.
opportunities.invalidationHint: Pullback turns into forced unwind: underwater traders dominate and risk shrinks fast.
